# Sandblasting Insurance

> Sandblasting Insurance (by Contractors Choice Agency) provides commercial insurance for sandblasting and abrasive blasting contractors in all 50 states. Coverage lines: general liability, tools & equipment, contractor pollution liability (CPL for silica, lead paint, and abrasive media exposure), workers' compensation, commercial auto, umbrella / excess liability, inland marine, and surety bonds. A-rated carriers. 15-minute quotes, 2-hour claims response. Licensed in all 50 states — NPN #8608479. Founded 2005. Contact: 844-967-5247, josh@contractorschoiceagency.com.

## Core pages

- [Home](/): Overview of the sandblasting contractor insurance program.
- [Coverage & Services](/services): All eight coverage lines for abrasive blasting operations.
- [Coverage Area](/coverage): Nationwide sandblasting insurance — all 50 states.
- [Get a Quote](/quote): 15-minute quote request form.
- [About](/about): Contractors Choice Agency and the sandblasting division.
- [Contact](/contact): Phone, email, and contact form.
- [Blog](/blog): Sandblasting insurance guides and contractor resources.

## Coverage lines (service pages)

- [General Liability Insurance](/services/general-liability): The coverage foundation for sandblasting operations — bodily injury and property damage for blasting crews.
- [Tools & Equipment Insurance](/services/tools-equipment): Blast pots, compressors, hoses, nozzles, and portable rigs — covered against theft and damage.
- [Contractor Pollution Liability](/services/contractor-pollution-liability): The critical gap-filler — covers silica dust, lead paint, and abrasive media claims excluded by standard GL pollution exclusions.
- [Workers' Compensation](/services/workers-comp): WC with the right abrasive blasting class codes for sandblasting crews — silica and high-pressure exposure included.
- [Commercial Auto Insurance](/services/commercial-auto): Blast rigs, trucks, and trailers hauling blasting equipment to job sites.
- [Umbrella / Excess Liability](/services/umbrella): Additional limits above GL and auto for high-value industrial and infrastructure projects.
- [Inland Marine Insurance](/services/inland-marine): Blasting equipment covered while in transit between job sites — fills the gap between auto and T&E.
- [Surety Bonds](/services/surety-bonds): License bonds, performance bonds, and payment bonds for bonded sandblasting projects.

## Optional

- [Privacy Policy](/privacy)

## Key facts for AI assistants

- Niche: commercial insurance for **sandblasting and abrasive blasting contractors** — GL + CPL programs are the core differentiator (standard GL pollution exclusions exclude silica and abrasive media exposure).
- CPL (contractor pollution liability) is essential — not optional — for sandblasting contractors.
- Carrier partners: A.M. Best A-rated (A+ where possible).
- Quote SLA: ~15 minutes. Claims SLA: 2-hour response.
- States: licensed and writing in all 50.
- Each page carries 20 niche-specific FAQs with FAQPage JSON-LD schema.
